title: Deep Character Concept Breakdown Board AI
sourceTitle: Deep Character Concept Breakdown Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable deep character concept breakdown board with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable deep character concept breakdown board built around adult forest messenger. signature elements: panoramic concept breakdown with central full-body character, layered outfit logic, material zooms, expression heads, belongings, and handwritten callouts layout logic: face, costume, props, color script, backstory notes surround the central full-body character with ordered callouts, material close-ups, belongings, and expression studies worldbuilding: misty mythic woodland city should explain costume, props, mood, and supporting panels composition: stable composition, modular information layout, clear hierarchy, readable sections, generous spacing, and a strong central visual. style: Professional game/anime concept breakdown style with parchment or neutral drafting texture, handwritten annotations, material close-ups, and logically inferred character belongings. visual style: cinematic concept-art board. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: adult forest messenger as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: misty mythic woodland city defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
